mainEntity.name: Can I Afford a Lawyer if I’m Not Receiving My Paychecks?
mainEntity.text: Can I Afford a Lawyer if I’m Not Receiving My Paychecks?

acceptedAnswer.text: A: Generally, no! We work on a contingency basis, meaning we only get paid if we win you a settlement. You shouldn't have to worry about hourly bills while you’re trying to recover. We focus on getting you a larger settlement and better medical care without any upfront stress. If you're in Utah or Idaho and feeling overwhelmed, just reach out for a free chat.
